title: Agent Benchmark Suite — Bug Fix, Build Landing Page, Improve
description: Build and run 3 benchmark types: bug-fix (5 directives x 3 configs), landing page build (pixel art aesthetic, 3 configs), and improve-and-polish. Produces inspectable HTML artifacts and summary reports.

dod.criterion: All 3 benchmark types complete with summary.json and inspectable artifacts

tasks.title: Create benchmark harness with config-aware fixture isolation
tasks.scope: Build tests/e2e/dim-agent-benchmark.sh, lib/benchmark-utils.sh, and tests/fixture/CLAUDE.md. Accepts --type and --config flags. Reset fixture between runs. Scaffold agent configs per preset.

dod.criterion: dim-agent-benchmark.sh exists and accepts --type and --config flags
lib/benchmark-utils.sh provides reset_fixture, scaffold_config, timing functions
tests/fixture/CLAUDE.md exists describing the fixture app
scaffold_config creates correct agent count per preset

tasks.title: Test Type A: Bug-fix benchmark across agent configs
tasks.scope: Run 5 directives x 3 configs = 15 agent sessions. Each resets fixture, spawns agent, runs validate.sh, captures results + artifacts.

dod.criterion: All 5 directives run across all 3 configs (15 runs)
Fixture reset between runs (no cross-contamination)
validate.sh output captured per-run with pass/fail counts
Modified files copied to results dir for CEO inspection
summary.json with per-directive per-config pass/fail and timing

tasks.title: Test Type B: Build gruai landing page benchmark
tasks.scope: Create landing-page-spec.md (pixel art/retro game aesthetic). Run 3 configs, each builds the landing page. Output index.html per config for CEO comparison.

dod.criterion: landing-page-spec.md exists with pixel art/retro aesthetic requirements
3 configs each produce valid directive structure for landing page build
Results include directive files for CEO inspection
summary.json with per-config validation and timing

tasks.title: Test Type C: Improve-and-polish benchmark
tasks.scope: Take best landing page, give improve directive. Run across configs. Output improved HTML + diff from original.

dod.criterion: improve-spec.md exists with polish/responsive/a11y requirements
Results include directive structure per config
Regression check: directive scope mentions preserving original sections

tasks.title: Build markdown summary report aggregating all results
tasks.scope: generate-report.sh reads all results and produces BENCHMARK-REPORT.md with tables for bugfix, landing page, improve, timing, and file manifest.

dod.criterion: BENCHMARK-REPORT.md contains bug-fix, landing page, improve tables
File manifest lists every inspectable artifact
Report renders as valid GitHub-flavored markdown
